description: Official Stats NZ building-consent release and workbook series
source_name: Stats NZ Building Consents Issued DataInfo+
warnings: Consents are intentions or authorisations, not completed buildings.
Keep residential units, buildings, alterations and non-residential measures distinct.
Preserve revised series and geography-boundary context.

record_fields.measure_scope: verify count, value or floor area in linked series

value.help: retrieve published value measures by supported region

compare-regions.help: compare latest published regional dwelling counts

definitions.help: show measure, classification and revision definitions
